hero_subtitle: Upload a photo. Get your royal portrait in seconds. Free to preview - no credit card, no commitments, no peasantry.
upload_max_error: You can only upload up to {{max}} images at once.
upload_type_error: Please upload only JPG, PNG, or WebP images.
upload_size_error: All images must be smaller than {{max}}MB.
upload_select_error: Please select at least one image first
upload_rate_limit_reached: Rate limit reached. Please try again later.
upload_prompt_title: Upload 1-{{max}} Photos - Peasants, nobility, and pets all welcome.
upload_prompt_subtitle: (Clear face required. Sunglasses and hats are frowned upon by the court.)
preview_store_subtitle: Pixels are temporary. Oil paint lasts centuries.
cred_desc_1: For over ten years, we’ve been turning everyday humans and exceptionally good pets into historical royalty.
cred_desc_2: No oversized office printers. Just master artists and a blank canvas.
cred_desc_3: Because a regular selfie simply doesn't command enough respect.
cred_desc_4: Painted so beautifully, your descendants will literally fight over it.
email_prompt_desc: You've created a few portraits today! To continue generating safely, please enter your email address.
